00001| <<<<<<< HEAD
00002| # 1. Ignore massive or local temporary data
00003| **/runtime/
00004| **/sessions/
00005| **/tool-results/
00006| **/temp/
00007| **/.accio/
00008| subagent-sessions/
00009| conversations/
00010| 
00011| # 2. Ignore credentials and device-specific pairings
00012| mcp_oauth/
00013| pairings/
00014| connectors/
00015| 
00016| # 3. Build artifacts and large files
00017| *.pdf
00018| *.xlsx
00019| *.xls
00020| *.mp4
00021| *.zip
00022| *.tar.gz
00023| 
00024| # 4. Folders with system-level data we don't usually sync
00025| channels/
00026| mcp_oauth/
00027| =======
00028| # Build results and binaries
00029| *.mp4
00030| >>>>>>> b79540a (Synchronize data files (PDF, Excel, JSON) to GitHub)
00031| 
00032| # 5. System files
00033| .DS_Store
00034| Thumbs.db
00035| 
00036| # 6. Specific allows (Ensure agents and skills are IN)
00037| !agents/
00038| !skills/
00039| !plugins/
00040| !permissions/
00041| !tasks/
00042| !connected-accounts.json
00043| !profile.jsonc
00044| 
00045| # (Optional) If you want to sync chat history, comment out 'conversations/' above.
00046|
name: read

arguments.content:
# Ignore system and large logs
**/runtime/
**/sessions/
**/tool-results/
**/temp/
**/.accio/
subagent-sessions/
conversations/

# Allow everything else (scripts, docs, data)
!*.pdf
!*.xlsx
!*.xls
!*.json
!*.md
!*.py
!*.js

# Still ignore the video if you want, but user said "data"
# video.mp4

# System files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
